prestazioni: Engine swap to 3S-GTE Gen 4 (260hp stock, but built with Tomei 272° cams, HKS GT-SS turbo manifold, and Garrett GT3076R turbo for 400whp on E85 with Haltech Elite 2500 ECU managing sequential fueling via ID1000 injectors and custom 3.5" intercooler piping)

Full chassis reinforcement via Cusco bolt-in 4-point roll cage (WILL VS-specific fitment) paired with Tein Flex Z coilovers (custom valved for 1G-FE/3S-GTE weight distribution) and Whiteline 24mm adjustable rear sway bar to eliminate body roll in tight JDM touge corners

Drivetrain overhaul with OS Giken Super Lock LSD (8-bolt diff conversion), TRD 8000rpm clutch kit (modified for 3S-GTE flywheel), and custom 4.444 final drive ratio via Toyota RA61 Celica GTS ring & pinion set (requires custom axles from Driveshaft Shop)
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny VS-01 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon overfenders, and custom rear diffuser) with custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap (Toyota 040 code) and JDM-spec Will VS side decals (replica of 2001 Tokyo Auto Salon show car)

OEM+ headlight retrofit with Morimoto HID projectors (35W 5500K) and custom LED halo rings (WILL VS-specific housing), paired with Depo JDM-style smoked taillights (sequential turn signals via Diode Dynamics controller)

Interior stripped and rebuilt with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (WILL VS-specific mounting brackets), Takata 4-point harnesses, and custom carbon fiber dash overlay (matching Toyota Will VS "Cyber" trim theme) with Defi BF gauges (oil temp, boost, and wideband) mounted in a custom A-pillar pod
